mean_cn: v.发展，壮大；开发，研制；逐渐形成，逐渐养成；生长，发育
mean_en: to gradually grow or become bigger, more advanced, stronger, etc.; to make something do this; to think of or produce a new idea, product, etc. and make it successful; to begin to have something such as a disease or a problem; to start to affect somebody/something; to start to have a skill, ability, quality, etc. that becomes better and stronger; to become better and stronger
sentence: The city's road system is developing very rapidly.
sentence_trans: 这座城市的道路系统发展地非常迅速。
word_etyma: de不 + velop盖上 → 不阻止，不掩盖 → develop发展
